query:
SELECT 
  pt.contract_no,
  pt.section,
  pt.receipt_no,
  CAST(COALESCE(pt.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS amount,
  DATE(pt.paid_at) AS paid_date,
  DATE(pt.created_at) AS created_date,
  pt.updated_by,
  pt.created_at,
  c.status AS contract_status
FROM payment_transactions pt
INNER JOIN contracts c ON c.contract_no = pt.contract_no AND c.section = pt.section
WHERE pt.contract_no = 'CT0924-NRT001-00138-01'
  AND pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC;
